name: daily-stats-email
description: Emails each workspace its daily block summary. Triggered by the daily_stats Kafka topic, produced by the ax_prod pg_cron job daily_block_stats() (pg_net -> Kafka Bridge). Renders the stats (totals, by-action, top rules/countries/ASNs, unique IPs, day-over-day) with data.template and sends via resend.email to ${variables.email_recipients}. Install per-tenant and set the email_recipients variable.

parameters.template:
Daily security summary — {{.date}}

{{printf "%.0f" .total}} requests blocked yesterday (previous day: {{printf "%.0f" .total_prev}}).

By action: {{range $k, $v := .by_action}}{{$k}} {{printf "%.0f" $v}}; {{end}}

Unique source IPs: {{printf "%.0f" .unique_ips}}

Top rules

    {{range .top_rules}}
  • {{.name}} — {{printf "%.0f" .events}}
    • {{end}}

Top countries

    {{range .top_countries}}
  • {{.country}} — {{printf "%.0f" .events}}
    • {{end}}

Top networks (ASN)

    {{range .top_asns}}
  • AS{{printf "%.0f" .asn}} — {{printf "%.0f" .events}}
    • {{end}}
